description:
Train K-Nearest Neighbors and Decision Tree classification models in JASP to predict supplement type ('supp') from tooth length ('len') and 'dose' using the 'Tooth Growth.csv' dataset located in '~/Documents/JASP/'. Ensure 'dose' is treated as Scale or Ordinal and 'supp' as Nominal. For both models, set the random seed to 42 and enable the AUC metric. Save the project to '~/Documents/JASP/Classifier_Comparison.jasp' and record the performance results in '~/Documents/JASP/model_performance.txt' using the following format:

KNN AUC: [value]
Decision Tree AUC: [value]
Best Model: [KNN or Decision Tree]
